# Cloud Intelligence & Automation Ops Domain

**Agent Owner:** Mr. Red (Cloud Intelligence & Automation Ops)
**Tech Stack:** GitHub Actions, Python Scripts

This directory governs the automated CI/CD pipelines and time-based chronometers for VibeOS. 

Responsibilities include the 8:00 AM daily health analysis GitHub Action, test automation, and configuring the build/deploy pipelines for the backend to Cloud Run.
